summary: Hydrated state keeps #39777 as the canonical issue. #39806 is a focused open PR candidate for the same bug, but it is not merge-ready because bot review found an actionable layout regression, mergeability is unknown, one check is failing, and this dedupe-only job blocks merge/fix/PR creation; no close, comment, or label action is planned.

actions.reason: Representative #39777 is still open, current, non-security, and remains the best canonical tracking issue until #39806 is repaired/merged or replaced.
